message:

categorized entries for features, fixes, refactors, and chores.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,214 @@
+# Changelog
+
+All notable changes to the **beads-for-frankentui** repository are documented here.
+
+This repo is a [beads_viewer](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer) (`bv`) static-site deployment that publishes an interactive dashboard for the FrankenTUI project's issue tracker. Each deployment is generated by `bv --pages`, which snapshots the beads SQLite database, pre-computes graph layouts and triage data, bundles a fully self-contained single-page app (sql.js WASM, force-graph, Chart.js, Mermaid, Alpine.js, Tailwind CSS), and pushes the result to this repo for GitHub Pages hosting.
+
+**Live dashboard:** <https://Dicklesworthstone.github.io/beads-for-frankentui/>
+
+There are no semver tags or GitHub Releases in this repository. History is organized by deployment date.
+
+---
+
+## 2026-03-08 -- Third deployment (data refresh)
+
+**Commit:** [`d1a4f98`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads-for-frankentui/commit/d1a4f98d6c64f2d6a619beb49d41bc3df08428af)
+**Branch:** `main` (also force-pushed to `master`)
+**Generated:** 2026-03-08T18:41:03Z by `bv --pages`
+
+### Data growth
+
+| Metric | Previous (Feb 9) | This deploy | Delta |
+|--------|-------------------|-------------|-------|
+| Total issues | 1,592 | 2,590 | +998 (+63%) |
+| Dependencies | 2,327 | 3,700 | +1,373 (+59%) |
+| Database size | 7.1 MB (8 chunks) | 10.1 MB (11 chunks) | +3.0 MB |
+| Graph layout nodes | 26,832 lines | 43,302 lines | +16,470 |
+| Completion rate | 99% | 92% | -7pp |
+| Open issues | 11 | 204 | +193 |
+| Blocked issues | 1 | 157 | +156 |
+| Actionable issues | 10 | 47 | +37 |
+| Issue types | 6 | 6 | -- |
+| Bug count | 67 | 125 | +58 |
+| Feature count | 41 | 143 | +102 |
+| Epic count | 89 | 141 | +52 |
+
+### What changed
+
+- Massive issue expansion: nearly 1,000 new issues added across all categories, reflecting new work streams including OpenTUI import (translation, ingestion, certification), pane accessibility (`pane-a11y`), and pane performance (`pane-perf`).
+- Completion rate dropped from 99% to 92% due to the influx of new open/blocked work.
+- New health warning surfaced in README: "More issues are blocked than actionable."
+- Top priorities shifted from VFX optimization and FrankenTerm WASM to accessibility hardening (`bd-2vr05.7.3`) and OpenTUI import certification.
+- Critical bottlenecks now include 5 items (up from 1), with the top blocker (`bd-3bxhj.4.10`) gating 6 downstream issues.
+- `data/history.json` removed (was present only in the initial deployment).
+- Cache-bust version on static assets updated to `1772995263`.
+
+---
+
+## 2026-02-09 -- Second deployment (data refresh)
+
+**Commit:** [`aaa08c9`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads-for-frankentui/commit/aaa08c990de34ccd4af6685b8361172612b8cfda)
+**Branch:** `master` (orphan commit; later superseded on `main`)
+**Generated:** 2026-02-09T18:36:27Z by `bv --pages`
+
+### Data growth
+
+| Metric | Previous (Feb 4) | This deploy | Delta |
+|--------|-------------------|-------------|-------|
+| Total issues | 1,168 | 1,592 | +424 (+36%) |
+| Dependencies | 1,743 | 2,327 | +584 (+34%) |
+| Database size | 5.8 MB (6 chunks) | 7.1 MB (8 chunks) | +1.3 MB |
+| Graph layout nodes | 19,832 lines | 26,832 lines | +7,000 |
+| Completion rate | 87% | 99% | +12pp |
+| Open issues | 149 | 11 | -138 |
+| Blocked issues | 60 | 1 | -59 |
+| Actionable issues | 89 | 10 | -79 |
+| New issue type | -- | `subtask` (36) | new |
+
+### What changed
+
+- Major burn-down: 1,581 of 1,592 issues closed (99% completion). Velocity peaked at 1,237 closures in the week of Feb 2.
+- New `subtask` issue type appeared (36 items), indicating finer-grained work breakdown.
+- Bug count doubled (32 to 67), feature count grew (29 to 41), epic count grew (71 to 89).
+- Top priorities shifted from Mermaid engine config and E2E testing to VFX optimization (`bd-3e1t.5.3`) and FrankenTerm WASM demo (`bd-lff4p.3.6`).
+- Only 1 critical bottleneck remained (down from 5), reflecting nearly-complete backlog.
+- `data/history.json` dropped from this deployment onward.
+- GitHub Actions workflow (`static.yml`) included in this orphan commit.
+- Cache-bust version on static assets updated to `1770662188`.
+
+---
+
+## 2026-02-04 -- Initial deployment
+
+### 2026-02-04 18:05 -- Add GitHub Pages workflow
+
+**Commit:** [`4a54c07`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads-for-frankentui/commit/4a54c075a3b3891b4c8eb6077898cf6033b529bb)
+
+- Added `.github/workflows/static.yml`: GitHub Actions workflow for deploying static content to GitHub Pages.
+- Uses `actions/checkout@v4`, `actions/configure-pages@v5`, `actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3`, `actions/deploy-pages@v4`.
+- Triggers on push to `main` and manual `workflow_dispatch`.
+- Concurrency group `pages` with `cancel-in-progress: false`.
+
+### 2026-02-04 18:01 -- Trigger Pages rebuild v2
+
+**Commit:** [`766ab60`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads-for-frankentui/commit/766ab60cb5f136f34a90f9cf61eaa68c890e6340)
+
+- Empty commit to trigger a GitHub Pages rebuild (second attempt).
+
+### 2026-02-04 18:00 -- Trigger Pages rebuild
+
+**Commit:** [`9f2a15d`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads-for-frankentui/commit/9f2a15d82c368bdf365b9309324758b5bf3fb7fe)
+
+- Empty commit to trigger a GitHub Pages rebuild (first attempt).
+
+### 2026-02-04 17:59 -- Force cache refresh
+
+**Commit:** [`90c2c15`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads-for-frankentui/commit/90c2c15b7fea558ca140edc2eb6e94867697e841)
+
+- Appended blank line to `README.md` to force CDN/browser cache invalidation.
+
+### 2026-02-04 17:55 -- Initial site deployment
+
+**Commit:** [`cfeef48`](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads-for-frankentui/commit/cfeef487e793e80a58e6ad06af6edebbd5325034)
+**Generated:** 2026-02-04T22:55:10Z by `bv --pages`
+
+This is the founding commit. 39 files, 42,324 lines of code.
+
+#### Architecture
+
+The site is a fully self-contained, offline-capable single-page application with no server-side component. All querying happens client-side via sql.js WASM against a chunked SQLite database reassembled in the browser.
+
+#### Application modules (15,004 lines of custom JS)
+
+| File | Lines | Purpose |
+|------|-------|---------|
+| `index.html` | 4,134 | Main SPA shell with Alpine.js templating, Tailwind CSS styling, Mermaid diagram containers |
+| `viewer.js` | 3,510 | Core application: OPFS caching, chunk reassembly, FTS5 full-text search, materialized views, issue detail rendering |
+| `graph.js` | 3,847 | Force-directed dependency graph visualization with WASM-powered PageRank/centrality metrics, multiple view modes, Dracula theme |
+| `charts.js` | 761 | Interactive analytics dashboard: burndown/burnup progress, label dependency heatmap, priority distribution pie, type breakdown bar |
+| `styles.css` | 2,374 | Full stylesheet with dark/light mode, responsive layout, accessibility considerations |
+| `wasm_loader.js` | 154 | Lazy WASM module loader for hybrid scorer and graph analytics |
+| `hybrid_scorer.js` | 88 | Client-side graph-aware search ranking with 5 tunable presets (default, bug-hunting, sprint-planning, impact-first, text-only) |
+| `hybrid_scorer.test.js` | 45 | Unit tests for hybrid scorer |
+| `coi-serviceworker.js` | 136 | Cross-Origin Isolation service worker enabling SharedArrayBuffer for sql.js WASM on GitHub Pages |
+
+#### Vendored dependencies
+
+| Library | File(s) | Role |
+|---------|---------|------|
+| sql.js | `sql-wasm.js`, `sql-wasm.wasm` (640 KB) | Client-side SQLite engine |
+| D3.js v7 | `d3.v7.min.js` | Graph rendering primitives |
+| force-graph | `force-graph.min.js` | Force-directed graph layout |
+| bv_graph | `bv_graph.js`, `bv_graph_bg.wasm` (218 KB) | Custom Rust-compiled WASM for PageRank, centrality, shortest path |
+| Chart.js | `chart.umd.min.js` | Standard chart types |
+| Alpine.js | `alpine.min.js`, `alpine-collapse.min.js` | Reactive UI framework |
+| Tailwind CSS | `tailwindcss.js` | Utility-first CSS (JIT via CDN script) |
+| Mermaid | `mermaid.min.js` (3.2 MB) | Diagram rendering for issue descriptions |
+| Marked | `marked.min.js` | Markdown to HTML |
+| DOMPurify | `dompurify.min.js` | HTML sanitization |
+| Inter Variable | `inter-variable.woff2` | UI font |
+| JetBrains Mono | `jetbrains-mono-regular.woff2` | Monospace font |
+
+#### Data files
+
+| File | Description |
+|------|-------------|
+| `beads.sqlite3` (5.8 MB, 6 chunks) | Full issue database with FTS5 indexes and materialized views |
+| `beads.sqlite3.config.json` | Chunk manifest with SHA-256 integrity hashes |
+| `data/meta.json` | Snapshot metadata: 1,168 issues, 1,743 dependencies |
+| `data/graph_layout.json` (19,832 lines) | Pre-computed force-graph node positions |
+| `data/project_health.json` | Aggregate health metrics, velocity stats, weekly burn-down |
+| `data/triage.json` | AI-generated triage recommendations, quick wins, blocker analysis |
+| `data/history.json` (2,169 lines) | 164 commit snapshots covering 2026-02-01 through 2026-02-04 |
+
+#### Initial project state
+
+- 1,168 total issues (87% complete, 149 open, 60 blocked, 89 actionable)
+- Types: 1,009 tasks, 71 epics, 32 bugs, 29 features, 27 docs
+- Priorities: P0: 41, P1: 344, P2: 634, P3: 141, P4: 8
+- Dependency graph: 1,743 edges, density 0.001 (healthy), no cycles
+- Top priorities: Mermaid Engine Config (`bd-315zw`), E2E fixture helpers (`bd-1av4o.13.2`), Mermaid Compatibility Matrix (`bd-3monr`)
+
+---
+
+## Repository structure
+
+```
+beads-for-frankentui/
+  .github/workflows/static.yml   # GitHub Pages deployment workflow
+  beads.sqlite3                   # Chunked SQLite database (reassembled client-side)
+  beads.sqlite3.config.json       # Chunk manifest with SHA-256 hashes
+  chunks/                         # Binary database chunks (1 MB each)
+  data/
+    graph_layout.json             # Pre-computed graph positions
+    meta.json                     # Snapshot metadata
+    project_health.json           # Health metrics and velocity
+    triage.json                   # Triage recommendations
+  index.html                      # SPA entry point
+  viewer.js                       # Core viewer application
+  graph.js                        # Force-graph visualization
+  charts.js                       # Analytics charts
+  styles.css                      # Stylesheet
+  hybrid_scorer.js                # Search ranking engine
+  hybrid_scorer.test.js           # Scorer unit tests
+  wasm_loader.js                  # WASM module loader
+  coi-serviceworker.js            # Cross-origin isolation worker
+  vendor/                         # Vendored JS/WASM/font dependencies
+```
+
+## Branch topology
+
+- `main` -- primary branch, target for `bv --pages` deployments
+- `master` -- mirror of `main` (force-pushed for compatibility)
+- `gh-pages` -- GitHub Pages deployment target (managed by Actions)
+
+## Deployment mechanism
+
+Each deployment is a full-tree orphan-style commit produced by `bv --pages` from the [beads_viewer](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer) tool (`bv`). The tool:
+
+1. Reads the beads SQLite database for the target project
+2. Generates graph layouts, triage data, project health metrics, and a README
+3. Chunks the database into 1 MB binary segments with SHA-256 integrity hashes
+4. Bundles the viewer SPA with all vendored dependencies
+5. Commits everything and pushes to the target repository
+6. GitHub Actions (`.github/workflows/static.yml`) deploys the result to Pages
